title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: 389-ds-base bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: 389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHDS12: Web console doesn't show Server Version [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104590)  The numSubordinates value is not matching the number of direct children. [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104592)  Error showing local password policy on web UI [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111227)  Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-112678)  Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-112692)  Exception thrown by dsconf instance repl get_ruv [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-112725)  AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113979)  lib389/replica.py is using unexisting datetime.UTC in python3.9 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114952)  Replication online reinitialization of a large database gets stalled. [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117048)  When the server restarts after a crash, the RFE assumes memberof should be recomputed. It triggers a memberof fixup task, dirsrv became unresponsive. [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117769)  Ignore the memberOfDeferredUpdate setting when LMDB is used.  [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117778)

full_text:
An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHDS12: Web console doesn't show Server Version [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104590)  The numSubordinates value is not matching the number of direct children. [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104592)  Error showing local password policy on web UI [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111227)  Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-112678)  Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-112692)  Exception thrown by dsconf instance repl get_ruv [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-112725)  AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113979)  lib389/replica.py is using unexisting datetime.UTC in python3.9 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-114952)  Replication online reinitialization of a large database gets stalled. [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117048)  When the server restarts after a crash, the RFE assumes memberof should be recomputed. It triggers a memberof fixup task, dirsrv became unresponsive. [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117769)  Ignore the memberOfDeferredUpdate setting when LMDB is used.  [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117778)
